AboutMeSection.first_paragraph: I am a FullStack Developer with over 3 years of experience building complete web and mobile applications — from the draft to the final product. I work with *React.js*, *Next.js*, and *Node.js* on a daily basis, focusing on clean code, scalable architecture, and user experience.
AboutMeSection.last_paragraph: More than writing code, my job is to understand the problem and turn your idea into a digital solution that really works.
AboutMeSection.soluction_example_list_Heading: I can help you if you need:
AboutMeSection.soluction_example_list: ["Web System from scratch","Online Stores & E-commerce","SaaS & Admin Dashboards","Landing Page","Mobile Apps","API Integrations (payments, WhatsApp, AI, and more)"]
AboutMeSection.differentials: ["I deliver quickly","Clean and scalable code","Direct communication","Focus on results"]
